review_text: Pritty average for the price.

Their single cabins are amazing
Modern clean the cost comfortable bed 4 pillows stocked kitchen just the best.
Counter staff are lovely.

Haven't tried the other sizes.

Private bathroom needs some work, mould in the shower.  toilet  and shower blocked up a few times. Otherwise not too bad. The kids loved pool
And playground

Good we love it there, dead quiet at night, no car or road noises, bathrooms only got renovated a couple years ago or so and are the best ameniete blocks in WAs van parks, went to a few from north to south and east to west and those are taking the cake, good they are good. Great service too and super location whole Park is the exact opposite in a positive way to the crappy banksia caravan park. More than highly recommended. Our number one choice when in Perth, number two is Woodman Point right behind it
Very good place and too quiet.

The environment was very clean, quiet, and safe. We stayed for five nights Cabin and everything we needed was provided. The staff were very friendly; when I asked for coffee powder, they kindly and politely brought it to me. They were always smiling. The location is close to shopping malls like DFO, the Airport, Costco ,Woolworths, Aldi, McDonald's, ⛽️ Petrol stations, KFC, and many other shops. The prices are reasonable, and I would recommend it. Fantastic Holiday

Wow what a great place to stay. Amenities spotless gardens kept so nice, sites are a great size for van, annex & car.
Special shoutout to Martin thank you for making sure we were able to extend due to medical reasons and the 2 ladies Jenny & Sharon H friendly great service. Definitely recommend this place to stay. Our new place to stay when in Perth👍
Nice area,
Staff are very helpful and friendly cabin was spotless
Great location near the airport. Noise is acceptable from planes. Big and new amenities. Nice big sites for the van to pull in

Very clean - cleaner than my own home. They were very friendly and the location is fantastic being so close to the airport. You can also park your car next to cabin which is very convenient. Travelled with a baby and they set up a port a cot for us.  The price point was the right price.
For what it is ! EXPENSIVE !
Good unit
Wifi very slow. Rooms clean.

Sehr freundlich. Toller Service 💞. Alle die hier arbeiten sind super nett und hilfsbereit.
Der Platz war eigentlich ausgebucht, aber uns wurde, nach höflichen Bitten dennoch ein kleiner Platz gegeben. Da wir nur eine Nacht brauchten und alles in und um Perth ausgebucht war. So nett. Wir waren so happy und haben uns sehr wohl gefühlt.
Neue Sanitäteranlagen, sehr sauber. Schöner Pool. Unsere Tochter war ganz begeistert. Es gab für sie sogar ein Malbuch von Discovery Parks und ein Wassereis.

Vielen lieben Dank nochmal🫶🏻

Stayed here for two nights in early December. Short drive to/from the airport. Check in was smooth and front desk staff was nice. She provided some activity packs when she discovered I was travelling with two kids.

Cabin was clean and comfortable, with free parking available. Basic amenities were also available. However, the WiFi was a little unstable. Shower area was also too cramped. Nonetheless, overall a decent stay, given it's not expensive as well, similar to other Discovery Parks.

Powered site and Drive-thru site

We like staying here when we visit Perth. Very convenient to access around. To get availability, we need to book early, many months before December arrives, because it is always fully booked. The staff are very supportive. The park's surroundings are well-maintained and beautiful, a quiet place despite its location on a busy road. Toilet facilities are clean and well-maintained. The internet and phone lines are clear coverage. Highly recommended!

Happy camper we enjoy our stay
Friendly staff, an the place is very clean you cant go wrong, an thank you to all the amazing staff
I highly recommend
Loved the caravan park. The pool was lovely. Very fresh and clean. Very easy to do a late check. Instructions were clear.
Was really family friendly had an amazing Christmas!
Top laugh and good value

We stayed here for 9 nights paying an average of $260 per night, rooms were clean and comfortable, service was ok-only problem was a bit stingy with giving coffee capsules, only supplying 1 capsule per person per day the location was good. My major complaint was the wifi- it was shocking, it's advertised free wifi and yet it has intermittent dropouts even when there are fewer people in the park as well as very late in the night, it makes no difference, I certainly will not recommend nor will I be staying here again!!
Clean rooms, nice environmenr
We stayed on a caravan site, very quiet park despite how close we were to the airport, great amenities, definitely good value for money.
Great location for what was needed. New and more than suitable rooms.
The service is amazing from all staff the amenities and rooms are emaculate location is perfect.
The only internet is if you stand net to the office, even 4 and 5 G  get unusable access.|Don’t advertise free wifi if there is none
Stayed one night and had stuff stolen of the front porch
The staff were friendly as! The camp was tidy as! Our cabin was immaculate!! They even set up a ******* house for the kids on Halloween!  Pretty cool!! Thank you.

We just had an incredible stay at this discovery park a travel family that really can appreciate a home that is not home. The staff at this park are welcoming we choose to stay here as a family and brought 5 other families here for Halloween and we were blown away with the effort this park had gone to for all the kids in the park . Being respectful towards those who weren’t participating too. We can’t thank you guys enough specially the manager that worked above and beyond to create a haunted villa for the kids to explore. The park itself is quiet with a huge kids room and theatre room pool and park. It’s central to the city also.

Thank you again guys for making our stay one to remember ♥️
Great spot. Beautiful park. Very new amenities.  Just alot of mosies in toilet area and unfortunately they loved me.
很棒！環境乾淨！

Perfect for what we needed, very clean, comfortable beds, easy location to get to. Staff friendly and helpful.

2025 this is our 2nd visit to Perth in 2 years and we will stay here again,
Perfect location the staff were very helpful with information we needed to get into the city, ground very  clean and well taken care of, BBQ and all amenities clean and hygienic,  a safe and friendly environment for all.
Thank you for a wonderful stay.
We had a theft inside the park and Discovery Parks never replied to my complaint. Not even a single email. Shameful customer service and zero responsibility

It's been a while since we've stayed at a caravan park, maybe a decade or so! We stayed in a cabin and it was a really pleasant surprise. The place was well maintained, convenient, and leafy green with lawn areas and trees. Even though our cabin was near the road it was really quiet.
Our room was clean, with a huge tv and the most comfortable bed ever.
The staff were lovely.
Such a great park! I was worried due to previous reviews but the team here couldn't be more helpful. No issues with crime or anything. Central location. Excellent facilities!

Awsome Park to visit.
Staying in a cabin and wieth the visit with king bed and a 60 inch tv.
Bathroom is well presented, stove microwave and fridge with complimentary coffee and tea.

First time but also will be the last time for me to stay in Discovery Park. Room is just ok, service is just ok, suburb is just ok, wifi is poor, the only good thing is it is close to Perth hills for hiking. The issue is I’m driving my EV and live in a cabin, but I even can’t charge my EV when I’m living in a cabin. This never happened when I stayed with other caravan parks. I will never travel to and stay at a place where I cannot even charge my EV, so this will be my last time staying with Discovery Park.

Office staff helpful.
Powered site excellent.
Very competitive price.

Have stayed here a couple of times with our van, lastly with a 2 bed cabin for family as well. Cabins are modern, spotless, spacious and well appointed.
2nd time we stayed we asked for a drive through site as some of the other standard sites are a bit tricky to get into with a caravan when it’s busy.
All in all a great location. Had no issues with thieving as others mention. Amenities spotless too and the radio a great touch. Will be back again a bit later in year
Late check in and very early check out (3:45 am) so we didn’t make use of any facilities.Great location for airport access.Cabin was perfect for our needs.
Park was very clean and tidy and amenities were spotless. Would stay there again.

Only complaint is the aircon in my room smelled of old sweaty gym clothes. Room was good for a short stay but need to lock cars as outsiders tried to break in. Hotel staff was nice and follow up was good to ensure we could check in late.
WiFi terrible

We have just spent a fair amount of time staying at Discovery Park Perth Airport during a 14-month stint of caravan living whilst building a house. It was the perfect place to stay; we absolutely loved it. The park itself looks beautiful and the amenities are modern and clean. The staff, like Jenny, Sharon and Paul, are absolutely lovely, so warm, friendly and helpful. This is not always the case and certainly helps set this caravan park apart from others. We found our stay quiet and relaxing with everything we could want. It is perfect for those travelling with dogs. We cannot wait to return for another stay very soon. Highly recommended! Mel and Fred :)

We had to be in Perth for a week, this was very convenient park to where we needed to be .. not in the city ... shopping centres not 1-2 kms either side .. reception ladies very helpful when needing to extend stay. Facilities are awesome compared to alot of others.. kids games room ... was lovely stay .. highly recommend

Lovely caravan park.
Very nice, clean amenities.
2nd time we have stayed with our motorhome.

We stayed here for 3 months and the staff are fantastic.|We would go into the office and ended up having a chat and a laugh with Jenny and Sharon.|Paul very helpful and a great guy.|We have booked our stays for the rest of the year because we feel save and relaxed here.|😎
Totally unsafe. Saw dodgy people walking around after hours

I had all my valuables stolen from my car. Apparently a common occurrence that management continue to do nothing about.

No cameras - “we used to have a security guard but now we don’t…”

Disappointing lack of accountability. Thieves come through the park on an almost nightly basis by all reports. Not even the offer to refund the $60 we paid for the night after over $5000 worth of stuff was stolen from our car that was less than a metre from where we were sleeping. And only 5 metres from the camp facilities!
Robbery seems far too common in this caravan park.

Like many travellers, we chose Discovery Parks – Perth Airport for a one-night stay on 20/04 before an early flight. Unfortunately, it turned into a nightmare. We camped in a swag just a meter from our vehicle near the kitchen and other shared facilities (site 31), surrounded by other tents. During the night, while we slept, our unlocked car was broken into and two suitcases and two rucksacks were stolen.||||This wasn’t a quick smash-and-grab. The thieves carefully went through our belongings next to the laundry and bathroom areas, selectively taking high-value items like two laptops, an iPad, and earphones, while leaving behind anything that could trace them – AirTags, car keys, etc. They even scattered some of our personal ID documents around the campsite, showing they took their time and felt no fear of being caught (see photos of our found items).||||The next morning, we learned this wasn’t an isolated incident. Other guests told us this had happened two or three nights in a row. One neighbour had an e-bike stolen after its cable was cut from their trailer. Another said their car was also opened. Even the police mentioned this caravan park has had ongoing issues with theft.||||The most shocking part? The management's complete lack of responsibility or concern. When we reported it, the receptionist brushed it off as "bad luck" and said theft is to be expected during busy periods like Easter. She casually mentioned that this has happened before and even suggested the thieves may escape along the river by the park. Despite having a CCTV camera at the front gate, she dismissed reviewing the footage as "“pointless, citing high activity between 1am–5am "". The manager never even showed up or reached out to us. It was excuse after excuse to avoid doing anything helpful or reassuring.||||The only person who actually helped was a maintenance staff member, who kindly assisted us in recovering some of our scattered items. His support was the sole silver lining in an otherwise appalling experience.||||Final warning to future guests:||Theft is clearly a known and ongoing issue at this park, and there seems to be zero action taken by management to prevent or address it. No additional security, no warnings to guests, no signs posted, no accountability. Consider this your warning.

Unsafe – Rampant Theft and No Accountability from Management

Like many travellers, we chose Discovery Parks – Perth Airport for a one-night stay on 20/04 before an early flight. Unfortunately, it turned into a nightmare. We camped in a swag just a meter from our vehicle near the kitchen and other shared facilities (site 31), surrounded by other tents. During the night, while we slept, our unlocked car was broken into and two suitcases and two rucksacks were stolen.

This wasn’t a quick smash-and-grab. The thieves carefully went through our belongings next to the laundry and bathroom areas, selectively taking high-value items like two laptops, an iPad, and earphones, while leaving behind anything that could trace them – AirTags, car keys, etc. They even scattered some of our personal ID documents around the campsite, showing they took their time and felt no fear of being caught (see photos of our found items).

The next morning, we learned this wasn’t an isolated incident. Other guests told us this had happened two or three nights in a row. One neighbour had an e-bike stolen after its cable was cut from their trailer. Another said their car was also opened. Even the police mentioned this caravan park has had ongoing issues with theft.

The most shocking part? The management's complete lack of responsibility or concern. When we reported it, the receptionist brushed it off as "bad luck" and said theft is to be expected during busy periods like Easter. She casually mentioned that this has happened before and even suggested the thieves may escape along the river by the park. Despite having a CCTV camera at the front gate, she dismissed reviewing the footage as "“pointless, citing high activity between 1am–5am "". The manager never even showed up or reached out to us. It was excuse after excuse to avoid doing anything helpful or reassuring.

The only person who actually helped was a maintenance staff member, who kindly assisted us in recovering some of our scattered items. His support was the sole silver lining in an otherwise appalling experience.

Final warning to future guests:
Theft is clearly a known and ongoing issue at this park, and there seems to be zero action taken by management to prevent or address it. No additional security, no warnings to guests, no signs posted, no accountability. Consider this your warning.

Managers & Reception are hostile & rude.
Location & Park - beautifully done.
Cleaning/Maintenance - Friendly & the team do a great job.
Mosquito heaven due to waterway.
Very pet friendly - owners to abide rules.
Basic shops close by.
And short distance to bigger stores like DFO.

Grounds very dirty and lots of sand.
Never saw any up keep on sites at all
Lovely campsite - fantastic staff and clean facilities.
Great place , clean and tidy grounds. Friendly staff. Great amenities
Fantastic site, facilities are all new and well looked after.  Pool is lovely and clean.  Staff friendly and helpful.
I stayed here on a recent overnighter in Perth. The cabin was very comfortable, clean, and tidy. The after-hours self-check-in service was great. Easily found by the Uber drivers.
Great cabins, great location, friendly staff.

Awesome staff throughout
When you are greeted by the reception staff through to the maintenance and cleaners
Cheers to you all making our stay safe and happy
As experienced travellers we can honestly say this is the nicest caravan park we have stayed at. The amenities are spotless and new. The staff are friendly and professional. Highly recommended.
Excellent location...very helpful and friendly staff.
Love the rooms and the bed
Great place, great location and assistance always available!
Lovely cabin, nice and clean. Well maintained. The kitchen had everything we needed to prepare a meal. Good-sized bathroom and bedroom. Very quiet and lovely pool and surrounds.
One of the best Discovery parks in Perth

Service is great, we stayed in a standard cabin for a family of 5, and cabin is very standard but lovely for those on an budget. Tidy and clean and beds are comfy. We ended up having to book for a extra night last minute and the staff were very lovely and accomadating. They upgraded our cabin to a deluxe, which is a lot nicer then a standard, and a little more spacious. There is a pool on site which is great for the family, when you just want to stay in with the kids. Loved our stay overall and will definitely be staying again on our next trip to Perth.

Love paying 70 bucks a night for staff to repeatedly turn sprinklers on to your pitch making your camping equipment filthy since you’re staying on a pitch that resembles a dust pit. This led to our pitch being waterlogged one day and our tent cover being covered in dirt and mud the next. When you have a 2pm check in and 10am checkout time you’ve got a 4 hour window to do maintenance works to the ground. A hotel wouldn’t come in and start painting your room mid-stay. Camp site itself is nice enough with nice toilet and shower areas, kitchen is outdated and was full of flies a couple of the nights we stayed. A few safety concerns with thefts being frequent there but was okay for us.

We have a powered drive-through caravan site, and it is absolutely beautiful here.  Very friendly staff, amenities very clean and spacious, grounds well looked after and sites perfect, close to shops and the best tavern we have been to while in Perth at the Hale Road Tavern which is walking distance with great food and atmosphere. Overall, it is one of the best parks we have stayed at. Highly recommend Discovery Perth Airport  Park. 5 star 🌟
Definitely will be back when in Perth.

I've  only been here for one night so far, and I love it. Great friendly staff. Clean and well maintained ammenities and grounds. Close to shopping centres and a fifteen minute walk straight down the street to the Hale Rd tavern. Which i highly recommend also. Happy to stay here whenever I'm back in town. Thanks guys

We stayed here for one night. Reception staffs were super friendly and welcoming.
Room was clean and perfect for the price. Check in check out was flexible and staffs were understanding. Our neighbors left on the day we came in the park and we had privacy like staying in the single house. Free icy pole and kit kat for kids! It was so sweet. Even though it is close to city tall trees and overall park atmosphere made us feel like camping far from the city. Overall happy with the experience.

Lovely quiet location. Very peaceful atmosphere. Surrounded by lovely trees and greenery. Not far from major roads but doesn’t give you that feeling at all. Lots of birds in the trees surrounding. Excellent location for families. Lovely clean swimming pool. Rooms in cabin very clean and well kept. I would happily stay here again. Felt safe at all times.

I have stayed here twice now, both on a powered site and in a cabin, both great experiences! The reception staff are welcoming and friendly, the park is very family friendly but also quiet enough to enjoy without kids! The amenities are clean and tidy and well replenished, pool was great. Cabins are also clean, comfortable and well self contained. This place is a gem in the area, easy location to access hwy & travel around Perth by car. We will definitely be back again.
Great location. We got an ensuite and loved it.
Downside is  wifi is not working all the time.

Appalling - Assistant Manager.|. |Customer Service does not exist with this woman. |Downright rude and smug. Will complain about people driving fast, however flies through the park on her golfcart. Never seen her actually do anything productive.|I have personally seen her fly the golfcart around, has nearly ran into other cars, pedestrians and children. ||I would change my rating higher, if i did not have to deal with her. However i was absolutely disgusted by the assistant managers lack of basic customer service, even before i had arrived and this only got worse with time being there. ||Unable to lodge complaints as no one in the office was willing to provide any information or willing to lodge any.

Horrible park ever. Happy to take the money and requested paid for whole months upfront not like other park. They are irresponsible for providing a safe and security place to stay. LOTS OF CRIMES. Check out the fence along the river and no camers, broken fence it. And they know about it but don't do anything towards it. Irresponsible.
DON'T recommended to anyone stay here IF YOU DON'T WANT YOUR STUFF GOT STOLEN Or CRIME VISIT YOUR SITE AT NIGHT. The crimes came to my site twice and other people told me that their stuff gots stolen in the same week as well. I couldn't sleep in that parks since and no one guard at night even once. The Dogs barks extreme loud roughly around 2-3am every night.

We are living on the road and have been visited lots of caravan park. This is the only one had my 1 star reviews. Go to Karrinyup Water Resort, their service, payment term, amenities, pools and security are extremely excellent. No wonder why everyone in that park moved here. Give me a like if you are agreeing Karrinyup water Resort are much much better with the same money. Don't waste your money here.

For my further case, I will report it to police.Thanks.

Awesome reception staff, friendly, helpful and very clean room. Unfortunately we had wake up the after hours service after a cancelled flight to get our key back.  Emma you're a life saver! 100% recommend this place.

I have camped here with a swag, great lawn and area for campers. Really big and super clean toilets and bathrooms, nice camp kitchen also and it comes with games room and theatre room for kids.
Geat big pool area as well with BBQs around the place.
Was a great experience 😊
Dump point available
good place for price

We stayed 5 days on a powered site and couldn’t rate this park more highly for it’s immaculate amenities, spacious sites (we chose a drive through), lovely gardens, quietness and super friendly, helpful staff. A great location from which to explore in all directions around Perth. Thank you Discovery Parks Perth Airport.
Nice and clean

Recently had a 3 week stay on an ensuite site.
The reception staff are lovely, the ensuite was beautiful and clean and was serviced weekly during our stay. The main ammenities and laundry were also spotless!
The grounds are also so well kept!
We have travelled Australia extensively and this park would be one of the best we have stayed at.
An absolute credit to management and the team!
Special shout out to the cleaning crew, you are all absolutely fabulous and do an amazing job.
We will be back!
Caravan park is spotless, a credit to the staff and owners, nothing was too much trouble for the friendly and obliging staff

We have had some car issues and staff have been so helpful and understanding with extra nights. Glenn was outstanding and moved our caravan for us so we could collect the car. AND the amenities are the best I have ever seen, so so clean and tidy. Staff were friendly and helpful.

We thoroughly enjoyed our recent stay at Discovery Park, Perth Airport. The powered tent sites are a very generous size, the kitchen is very well kept and equipped to be able to cook up a storm if you want to. We enjoyed a few nights cooking and talking with other guests while avoiding the rain. The theatre room is brilliant also, a great space to put on a movie and relax for a few hours. The park is only a short half hour drive away from the city, Kings Park and the zoo. There was a guest who was causing a few issues but they were swiftly dealt with by management once other guests brought it to their attention.
Very clean amenities. Friendly staff. Lgreat location to airport and shopping centres. Thankyou for having us.
Very clean and tidy awesome staff very helpful. Especially
Excellent service. Highly recommend. Could not be more accommodating.
We had flights from abrisbane to Perth but due to a Microsoft outrage unfortantely we couldn't make it until 1 night later. The Discovery Park transferred our one night. Very helpful
Nice clean park, facilities are modern and clean.

They were able  to accommodate  us  with a great powered site for our large 35ft caravan and small truck. Beautifully  kept grounds  and very clean toilet and laundry block. Staff are very friendly and helpful

Gorgeous park and clean cabin.
It was great for a nights stay before heading to the airport
Would stay again

We stayed in the Park 13th to 17th June. We had our car broken into with around $800 of items stolen. We reported it to the front office where the person in the reception said sorry the break in happened. I appreciate the fact that the Park isn't responsible for what happened.  They are however responsible for their actions in terms of follow up or making a simple offer or gesture of recompense. A return of one night's fees, a voucher for use at another park. We also spoke to another 3 guest at the park that experienced a similar fate.

Really enjoyed the location needed to be close to the airport we had a caravan site with a ensuite.
Very clean.
Friendly staff.
How ever the second last night we were to stay between 1:30 a.m. and 4:00 a.m.....the criminal aspect showed up and broken to many cars...
By the way they don't break windows anymore they use scanners to code your keys.... cars and tried to steal our bicycles lucky I have my motorcycle disc lock  on and that was alarmed.
Staff are friendly and accommodating for what you need. Rooms are always tidy and spotless for ready for the next guests. Highly recommended!
Great caravan park
Staff are very friendly and helpful, looking forward to staying again 😊
Location and environment very clean.

We stay at Discovery Perth Airport whenever we're in Perth. The cabins are clean and tidy, well appointed and have everything you need. The grounds are well maintained and facilities are lovely. Big thumbs up.
This is quite a large park with sites to suit all types of setups. The facilities are clean and well placed within the park. The staff are friendly and know a lot about the area.
Great place to stay, very clean and well thought through park. Good camp kitchen with anything you need to cook a meal, would definitely recommend!

Great park conveniently located close to all attractions.  Very clean and tidy park. We had a drive through site which was a very generous size. Friendly welcome by staff on arrival. Close proximity to Fremantle to go to Rottnest. Would definitely stay again.

We've stay her at least once a year and this park doesn't disappoint. The staff are always friendly and accommodating. The ablution blocks have recently been renovated and is looking fantastic. The park is always clean and tidy. We always stay on a powered site.
Excellent friendly and helpful staff.
Cleanest bathroom facilities!!!! Friendly and very accomodating staff! Our site was spacious and shady. One of the best caravan parks I’ve stayed at.
We love it, clean, tidy and an awesome pool right out front if you get the right cabin.

Had an onsweet power site. Descovery Parks staff said the site was sandy, they provided a sand mat very happy with staff being proactive. Observed vagrant person going to cabin verandahs checking for items. I did report this to staff who immediately stopped vagrant trespass.

Very accommodating & super friendly service from the lovely ladies in reception & lads on site.
Great pool, really clean, modern amenities. Boom gate security, short drive to local supermarkets, shops, fadt food & fuel.

Thank you for storing our van whilst we were away, great service.
I recommend taking pictures of the bed bases before you use them because you'll get blamed for breaking them.

Wir haben unsere letzte Nacht mit unserem Campervan dort verbracht, schon das Einchecken beim super netten Personal war ein Erlebnis, wir bekamen einen Discount von 10 % (wegen Apollo Campervan) und wir bekamen einen Late Checkout, weil unser Rückflug erst um 17:30 Uhr stattfand, ein wunderbar gepflegter Park mit tollen Duschräumen/Toiletten, ein sehr schöner Pool mit vielen Liegemöglichkeiten auch im Schatten ist vorhanden, alles sehr sauber, absolut ruhig und absolut empfehlenswert*****

We visited Discovery Parks-Perth Airport 3 times in the last 4 weeks. For Christmas and a trip to the zoo on Christmas Day something I've always wanted to do, then to pick up and return our kidlings and grankidlings to the airport, each time the staff and especially Jenny greeted us with a smile and a chat. Our last stay, a couple of guests had mechanical issues needing us on another site. We would of been happy with a standard site however we got upgraded to the ensuite sites which was lovely of the staff to do that for us and to also accommodate the couple in trouble, we noticed a couple other guests this park had helped during our stays, the staff are genuine and understanding people. This is a beautiful park and well managed with the kind of reception you want after a long drive or even a short one, their too nice. The utilities are spotless with an amazing pool area. At Christmas it was lovely seeing all the happy kids getting around the park. Being located near the airport you would think, oh no the noise, no there isn't much at all from the airport. It is just around the corner from a great shopping centre and parks for walks out of the caravan park. For further shopping a quick trip to the DFO at the airport, Belmont or Cannington. We sadly had to leave but when we are back in Perth this will be out go to park to stay in.
Just visiting friends here, can b a busy place but seems nice , did look at stayn in cabins but went in to town instead
Great stay, most helpful staff, very accommodating. Will stay again 😁
Great service! Absolutely covered the kids entertainment! Comfortable and spacious cabins! Would recommend

The problem with this and similar sites is they present as Hotel/ Motel accom where in fact we are looking at Caravan Sites and this is not considered.   We have Van Stayed many times here and Woodman Point and want this to be recognised.

Disappointed by the poor service, my brother is a FIFO work without a permanent address due to his house under construction. He simply need a place to camp with his son on the lawn area. Shockingly he was turned away rudely, probing into personal details beyond necessity. His experience was uncomfortable and the lack of empathy is disheartening, hoping for more understanding and accommodating service in future.

So discusted.... my son who is building a home near conpletion, who has rented 2 properties while waiting. Had his mailing address to my home in mean time, which is the next suburb gets called by u a homeless person and not welcme in fact banned. He does fly out 2wks, fly in one week . Choose yr park for just 2 nights of which u took the money.  So he could take his son to his daycare nearby
His plans after buying quality camp ,tent equipment to enjoy summer experience with his son before house completed .  Such a discusting call to make back to a son trying to everything right.  This is a boy who grow up here, schooled and worked local , but becouse he choose to  to do a camping experience with his son  at a convient time in hislife but to acommadate the paid for daycare or the child looses the spot. Book 2 fing days. Sorry its not possible to address mail to a vacant block.    I see u have a regular Maggy that stays with u on a similar basis, but call it home from home.  2 days for a tent.....not moving into the park hello.   How do u have the right to question over his life in a call back at his work. Answers please.....i will be taking this further

Rocked up with 21ft van ( phone booking already made) ~ experienced C/P operators ask size of van - but NADA ! , gave directions to our site .
There was no way ( from either directions) I was going to get my van into this site !, rang reception whilst blocking everything up ( where was I going anyway !) ~ please another site
Still no asking on van size !.
1 site left that would fit us - left .
Ladies in reception were very friendly and helpful.
Central and easy to find.
We got a pet friendly cabin here. Was happy with what we got for the price. Bedding was nice, white and clean. Would stay again.

A good place to stay to relax.

Reception people are very friendly.

They let us stay longer at day time for waiting for flights which is really nice.

Swimming pool is good.

Would like stay next time if I come to WA again.

Absolutely disgusted they don't take homeless people and we were told after they took our money and now its gonna take a couple of days to return that money.
Homeless people nit welcome should be on their website.  Thanks for taking our $ before telling us and thanks for the delay in returning our $.
I saw your response
Still disgusted the homeless are not allowed a break from what they have to deal with every day. My son is homeless but we are nit able to give him a  break for a few days like every one else is allowed a holiday but not the homeless.  Like they dont have stress. No this company is discriminating against our western Australian people.  This should not be ok in todays world
공항에서 가까워서 위치 좋음! 하지만 전기가 들어오지않았다. 다행히 샤워실과 잠만 자면 됐어서 잘 씻고 잘 자고 갑니다!

We have stayed at Discovery Park Airport many times over the years and have been very happy, but with our most recent stay we were very disappointed.|Our main disappointment was the floor was dirty obvious from the previous tenant and the air conditioner should be replaced as we could not use it because it was so noisy.|For what my wife and I paid for our four nights we expected much better as other family members had stayed in another facility nearby for a more comfortable conditions at a much cheaper rate. I’m sorry we are not happy this time.
Nice and quiet location, stayed in a cabin.  lovely well appointed rooms. Friendly , very helpful staff.  Will come again.

Great location ,close to shops and the Airport was a stone throw away
Staff were very friendly and catered to our every need , Cabin was very clean and up to date smart TV kept us entertained for hours watching NETFLIX along with the warm air conditioning system keeping us warm on the cold nights , thanks for your hospitality
I would highly recommend staying at this park
Wonderful place, For caravans,
